Pet Health App Market Analysis

The global pet care market is valued at approximately $320 billion in 2025, growing at 6.1% CAGR. The digital pet health segment represents $4.2 billion, with mobile apps capturing 35% of that market.

Key competitors include Pawp (telehealth), Petcube (monitoring), and BabelBark (records management). None offer a comprehensive AI-driven health prediction platform.

Target demographics: Millennials and Gen-Z pet owners aged 25-40, who spend an average of $1,200 annually on pet healthcare. 73% of this demographic prefers mobile-first solutions. Urban pet owners in the US and UK represent the highest-value segments.

Market trends indicate growing demand for preventive care, wearable health monitors for pets, and AI-powered diagnostic tools. Regulatory landscape is favorable as pet health apps are classified as wellness tools, not medical devices.
